starting_money.note: Base starting money by culture type. Multiply by social class Money Modifier.

barbarian.background_resources: Nothing but the clothes on their back, and maybe some personal armament
Resides on owners property; owns a few keepsakes

barbarian.example_titles: Churl, Commoner, Feine, Freedman, Karl, Labourer
barbarian.background_resources: Rented accommodation or farmland; possesses own tools or livestock, simple weapons
Owns a house, and either a farmstead, business or ship; furniture; tools, weapons & armour, mount, several servant or slave retainers; support from locals
As above but lives in a great hall and possessions are of excellent quality; fealty from a country or smaller region

civilised.background_resources: Nothing but the clothes on their back, and maybe some personal armament
Resides on owners property; owns a few keepsakes
Rented accommodation or farmland; possesses own tools or livestock; simple weapons

civilised.example_titles: Bailiff, Equite, Master, Official, Steward, Warden
civilised.background_resources: Owns property, farm or business; furniture, tools, weapons & armour, mount, several servant or slave retainers; support from locals

civilised.example_titles: Archon, Baron, Count, Duke, Lord, Nawab, Noble, Oligarch, Patrician, Satrap
civilised.background_resources: Owns several properties, extensive farmlands or multiple businesses; expensive furniture, tools, weapons & armour, mounts, many servants or slaves; fealty from regional inhabitants

civilised.example_titles: Caliph, Czar, Dictator, Emperor, Imperator, Maharajah, Mogul, Pasha, Pharaoh, Potentate, Prince, Rajah, Shah, Sultan, Tyrant
civilised.background_resources: As above but of priceless quality; fealty from a dominion or nation

nomad.background_resources: Nothing but the clothes on their back, maybe some personal armament, and mount or small boat if suitable
Resides on conquered lands, or in owner's yurt or vessel, owns a few keepsakes, plus tools or simple weapon
Possesses own mounts, cart or small boat; owns yurt or similar, half a dozen livestock, weapons, simple armour, a slave or two

nomad.example_titles: Chieftain, Emir, Khan, Khaqan, Sea Lord, Sheikh
nomad.background_resources: Owns many mounts, carts or boats; large yurt or similar, several dozen livestock, good weapons, good armour, some slaves, fealty from tribe and conquered peoples

primitive.background_resources: A weapon and a few knickknacks
Simple home, tools, and primitive weapons
Large hall; valuable skins, totems, trophies, tools, cooking implements, decorated primitive weapons, simple armour; support from tribe

culture_type_mapping.note: Maps AiG Gloranthan cultures to Mythras Core culture types for social class lookup. Lunar Provincial is Civilised; Tarshite characters choose Lunar Provincial or Sartarite.
